raw_judges: Jury were selected from a wide range of applications
Jury Members are internationally recognised experts, highly experienced, award-winning professionals from around the world in the field of Architecture and Interior Design
Jury Members do not know any personal information about the Designers, the blind judging process allows everyone to stand on equal terms and with equal chances
Jury Members vote on different aspects: Design, Functionality, Structures and Materials, Innovation and Sustainability, Market Value, Presentation
Jury Members give between 1 and 10 points for each aspect, which will be weighted for the final score
